test.note: Known pre-existing issue: no test files on disk (Tests/vMLXTests/ missing). Documented in AGENTS.md as out of scope. Not related to fast-path feature.

appliedUpdates.description: Corrected fast-path data flow in architecture.md: model() is used instead of model.prepare() because prepare() returns .tokens discarding logits. Added explanation of why this distinction matters.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Add coding convention: when adding new Engine methods that need the generation lock, factor the inner implementation into a private `_performX` method to keep lock acquisition/release/drain logic clean in the outer method.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: Engine.loglikelihood() wraps _performLoglikelihood() — outer method handles generationLock.acquire/release, idleTimer, metrics, and MLX drain; inner method does the actual computation. This is a clean pattern worth documenting.

suggestedGuidanceUpdates.suggestion: Consider adding a note about the MLX drain sequence (MLX.eval + GPU stream sync + CPU stream sync) being a candidate for extraction into a shared helper to reduce duplication across Engine methods.
suggestedGuidanceUpdates.evidence: The drain sequence appears identically in success and error paths of loglikelihood(), and in streaming code paths. Multiple locations could benefit from a shared drain helper.
